name: core
description: Host UK unified framework - Go CLI, PHP framework, multi-repo management

skills.name: core
skills.description: Use when working in host-uk repositories. Provides core CLI command reference.

skills.name: core-php
skills.description: Use when creating PHP modules, services, or actions in core-* packages.

skills.name: core-go
skills.description: Use when creating Go packages or extending the core CLI.

commands.name: remember
commands.description: Save a fact or decision to context

SessionStart.description: Check for recent session state on startup

PreCompact.description: Save state before auto-compact to prevent amnesia

PreToolUse.description: Suggest core CLI instead of raw go/php commands
Block random .md files, keep docs consolidated

PostToolUse.description: Warn about debug statements (dd, dump, fmt.Println)
Extract actionables from core CLI output
Warn about uncommitted work after git commit
